scene_description:
### Foreground  
- **Road surface**: A dark gray asphalt road dominates the lower half of the image, with a white dashed center line running parallel to the road’s length. The road has two lanes. A shadow of the vehicle (or camera) taking the photo is visible at the bottom center, stretching slightly toward the right. A distinct shadow of a pole (likely the street view camera’s pole) is cast on the right side of the road, extending from the right edge toward the center.  

### Midground  
- **Road shoulders**:  
  - The left side of the road has a gravel shoulder covered in dry, light brown grass and sparse low vegetation.  
  - The right side of the road also has a gravel shoulder, with similar dry vegetation and scattered patches of blue debris on the ground.  
- **Utility poles**: On the right side of the road, wooden utility poles (light brown, weathered) are visible. The nearest pole is at the right edge of the image, with crossbars holding multiple thin horizontal wires. Additional poles recede into the distance, spaced evenly along the right side of the road. The wires run parallel to the road and extend beyond the image’s right edge.  

### Background  
- **Landscape and horizon**: The terrain is flat and arid, covered in sparse, brownish dry vegetation extending to the horizon. Low, distant hills or mesas are visible on both the left and right sides of the image. The sky is clear, light blue, with no clouds.  

### Additional Observations (by category)  
- **Text & Signs**: No visible text, signs, banners, or stickers.  
- **Infrastructure**: Only wooden utility poles with crossbars and wires (as described). No bollards, barriers, street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, or guardrails.  
- **Vehicles & Plates**: No vehicles or license plates are present.  
- **Road Surface & Markings**: The road has a white dashed center line; no crosswalks, curbs, or lane markings other than the center line. The road surface is smooth asphalt with no visible damage.  
- **Buildings & Architecture**: No buildings, structures, or fences are visible.  
- **Vegetation & Terrain**: The terrain is flat, arid, and sparsely vegetated with dry grass. Distant low hills/mesas define the horizon line.

details.name: wooden utility poles
details.reason: The style of wooden poles with crossbars and wires can help identify certain regions like parts of Africa or Australia.
details.focused_description: A wooden utility pole stands vertically, cylindrical in shape with a slight taper from base to top. It is light brown in color with visible weathering, showing darker streaks and surface texture indicative of aging. The wood appears rough, with natural grain patterns and minor cracks. No text is visible on the pole.

details.name: white dashed center line
details.reason: The color and type of road markings can be a clue for specific countries.
details.focused_description: A white dashed line, consisting of short, straight segments with gaps, runs along the center of the road. The line is painted, white in color, and appears to be in good condition with no visible damage.
